name: claude-code-warp-v3-testing
description: Side-by-side v3 testing fork of warpdotdev/claude-code-warp. Install this alongside the official marketplace to test v3 hook lifecycle coverage without removing the upstream v2 plugin.

plugins.name: warp-v3
plugins.description: v3 hook coverage for claude-code-warp. Runs side-by-side with warp@claude-code-warp — disable one to avoid duplicate notifications.
